error_signature: column “content” of relation “viko_embeddings_openai” does not exist
title: PostgreSQL column 'content' does not exist error
symptom: When trying to insert embeddings into a PostgreSQL table, n8n throws an error stating that the column 'content' does not exist.
applies_when: Targeting a PostgreSQL table with a custom schema
not_this_if: Column names match exactly with the expected names
root_cause: The error occurs because the PostgreSQL table was manually created without the necessary specifications that n8n expects. Specifically, the Create Embeddings node may require certain default settings for columns, which are not present in manually created tables.
fix_steps: Allow n8n to automatically create the PostgreSQL table
Verify that the table structure matches the expected schema
Move the table to the desired schema if necessary
agent_instruction: Let n8n create the PostgreSQL table automatically to ensure proper column specifications.
